title: TCWP Export Profile
description: Defines which files to include when exporting a TCWP bundle in a specific mode (ops, training, sales).

includes.description: File names to include in this export profile

redaction_required.description: Whether PII redaction must be applied before export

training_consent_required.description: Whether allowed_for_training must be true on each record

external_sharing_consent_required.description: Whether allowed_for_external_sharing must be true on each record
